zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh de Bolebec於1195年出生在英國諾圖波藍德布藍倫德時，他的父親Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham55歲，母親Sibil de Vesci54歲。他和Tiphaine De Bailliol至少有1個兒子和6個女兒。他去世於1282年在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯享年87歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh de Bolebec was born in 1195, in Blanchland, Northumberland, England, his father, Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham, was 55 and his mother, Sibil de Vesci, was 54. He had at least 1 son and 6 daughters with Tiphaine De Bailliol. He died in 1282, in Morpeth, Northumberland, England, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh de Bolebec est né en 1195, à Blanchland, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Sibil de Vesci, avait 54 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles avec Tiphaine De Bailliol. Il est décédé en 1282, à Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh de Bolebec 1195 in Blanchland, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham 55 und seine Mutter Sibil de Vesci 54. Er hatte mit Tiphaine De Bailliol mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1282 im Alter von 87 Jahren in Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Bolebec è nato il nel 1195 nel Blanchland, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Sibil de Vesci, aveva 54 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie con Tiphaine De Bailliol. Morì nel 1282, nel Morpeth, Northumberland, England, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh de Bolebecが1195年にイギリスノースウンバーランドブランチランドで生まれた時，父Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckinghamは55歳，母Sibil de Vesciは54歳であった。彼はTiphaine De Bailliolとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼は1282年にイギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスで87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh de Bolebec(이)가 1195년 영국 노르스벌랜드 블랭클랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibil de Vesci(은)는 54세였다. 그는 Tiphaine De Bailliol(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1282년 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh de Bolebec nasceu em 1195, em Blanchland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Sibil de Vesci, tinha 54 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas com Tiphaine De Bailliol. Ele faleceu em 1282, em Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh de Bolebec родился в 1195 г. в местности бланчланд, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibil de Vesci, 54. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей от Tiphaine De Bailliol. Он умер в 1282 г. в местности морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh de Bolebec nació en 1195, en Blanchland, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Walter de Bolebec - Earl of Buckingham, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Sibil de Vesci, tenía 54 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 6 hijas con Tiphaine De Bailliol. Murió en 1282, en Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 87 años.
